/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/llama-gguf.dir/gguf.cpp.o" -o ../../bin/llama-gguf  -Wl,-rpath,"/Users/AqibMumtaz/Aqib Mumtaz/BitLogix/qwen-asr-local/qwen3-asr-local/llama.cpp/build/bin" ../../bin/libggml.0.11.0.dylib ../../bin/libggml-cpu.0.11.0.dylib ../../bin/libggml-blas.0.11.0.dylib ../../bin/libggml-base.0.11.0.dylib
